instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that formats `createdAt` as a medium date and `quantity` as a grouped integer. Both fields may be missing; show "Unknown date" and "0" respectively as defaults.
code:
<#-- Model: createdAt: date, quantity: number (both optional) -->

Created: <#if createdAt??> ${createdAt?string.medium} <#else> Unknown date

Quantity: ${(quantity!0)?string.number}
